text:
There once lived an old wise owl. Birds often came to listen.

One day a silly little bird flew over.

“Where?’’s a great big owl? Ow.

What’s wise?

Oh.


I know!

Birds.

What kinds?

Oh.

The.

 Owl.

And birds.


Say it with feeling.

Owl birds.

Oh.

Yes.

Birds.

Oh.

Oh.

Birds.

That’s funny. Ow.

Yes.

Birds.

Oh.

Oh.

Birds.

You think?

Yes.

Birds.

Oh.

Birds.

You silly. Ow.

Birds.

Well.

Birds.

You silly.

Oh.

Birds.

Owl birds.

Oh ow.

Ohbird!

That!

You!

Oh!

Birds!

Yes!

Birds!

Oh!

*A great big owl stared down joyfully.*

OOOOOO!

Aww.

Oh birds.

You naughty.

Oh!

Birds.

You.

Oh.

Birds.

*Goo.

Oh!
